description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push events with three jobs: Check, Test, and Deploy. The Check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dev dependencies, checks the package with python setup.py check, and runs pre-commit checks. The Test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 2.7 and 3.8, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs nose, and runs nosetests. The Deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest if the push event is a tag, needs the Test job to succeed, checks out the code, and deploys to PyPI using a token from secrets.
